title: ‘PlayStation 3’ launches
subtitle: Video game console from Sony Interactive Entertainment
fact: The PlayStation 3 is a home video game console developed and marketed by Sony Computer Entertainment (SCE).

title: ‘Wii’ launches
subtitle: Video game console from Foxconn
fact: The Wii is a home video game console developed and marketed by Nintendo.

title: ‘Xbox Series X and Series S’ launches
subtitle: Video game console from Microsoft
fact: The Xbox Series X and Xbox Series S are the fourth generation of consoles in Microsoft's Xbox series, succeeding the previous generation's Xbox One.
